name: OMIGOD SCX RunAsProvider ExecuteShellCommand - Auditd
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
SIGMA Title: OMIGOD SCX RunAsProvider ExecuteShellCommand - Auditd
SIGMA Description: Rule to detect the use of the SCX RunAsProvider Invoke_ExecuteShellCommand to execute any UNIX/Linux command using the /bin/sh shell.
SCXcore, started as the Microsoft Operations Manager UNIX/Linux Agent, is now used in a host of products including Microsoft Operations Manager.
Microsoft Azure, and Microsoft Operations Management Suite.


False positives:
- Legitimate use of SCX RunAsProvider Invoke_ExecuteShellCommand.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%syscall%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%uid%0%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/var/opt/microsoft/scx/tmp%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%sh%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY OMIGOD SCX RunAsProvider ExecuteShellCommand - Auditd on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%syscall%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%uid%0%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/var/opt/microsoft/scx/tmp%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%sh%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: OMIGOD SCX RunAsProvider ExecuteShellCommand - Auditd

Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
